mapper.select: SELECT customer.company_name AS companyName, customer.member_level AS memberLevel, customer.accumulated_paid_amount AS accumulatedPaidAmount, DATE_FORMAT(customer.last_level_upgrade_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastLevelUpgradeAt, customer.contact_name AS contactName, customer.contact_phone AS contactPhone, customer.invoice_title AS invoiceTitle, customer.tax_no AS taxNo, customer.bank_name AS bankName, customer.bank_account AS bankAccount, customer.invite_code AS inviteCode, address.province AS receiverProvince, address.city AS receiverCity, address.district AS receiverDistrict, address.detail_address AS receiverAddress, COALESCE( CONCAT(address.province, ' ', address.city, ' ', address.district, ' ', address.detail_address), '-' ) AS defaultAddress FROM sys_user u JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = u.member_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 AND member_account.status = 'ENABLED' AND member_account.member_type = 'CUSTOMER' JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.member_id = member_account.id AND customer.deleted = 0 AND customer.status = 'ENABLED' LEFT JOIN member_address address ON address.member_id = member_account.id AND address.deleted = 0 AND address.status = 'ENABLED' AND address.is_default = 1 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT merchant.id AS merchantId, merchant.shop_name AS shopName, merchant.license_no AS licenseNo, merchant.contact_name AS contactName, merchant.contact_phone AS contactPhone, merchant.shop_desc AS shopDesc, merchant.status AS status FROM sys_user u JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = u.member_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 AND member_account.status = 'ENABLED' AND member_account.member_type = 'MERCHANT' JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = member_account.id AND merchant.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT supplier.id AS supplierId, supplier.supplier_name AS supplierName, supplier.contact_name AS contactName, supplier.contact_phone AS contactPhone, supplier.supply_desc AS supplyDesc, supplier.qualification_file_id AS qualificationFileId, COALESCE(file_storage.original_name, '-') AS qualificationFileName FROM sys_user u JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = u.member_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 AND member_account.status = 'ENABLED' AND member_account.member_type = 'SUPPLIER' JOIN supplier_info supplier ON supplier.member_id = member_account.id AND supplier.deleted = 0 AND supplier.status = 'ENABLED' LEFT JOIN file_storage ON file_storage.id = supplier.qualification_file_id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(sku.id AS CHAR) AS id, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, sku.spec_text AS specText, sku.stock_qty AS stockQty, sku.safety_stock AS safetyStock, CASE WHEN sku.stock_qty <= sku.safety_stock THEN 'LOW_STOCK' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS stockStatus, COALESCE( ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(stock_log.created_time), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') FROM product_stock_log stock_log WHERE stock_log.sku_id = sku.id ), '-' ) AS lastChangeTime FROM supplier_info supplier JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = supplier.member_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = member_account.id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.supplier_id = supplier.id AND spu.deleted = 0 JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.spu_id = spu.id AND sku.deleted = 0 WHERE supplier.deleted = 0 ORDER BY sku.stock_qty ASC, sku.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supplier_info supplier JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = supplier.member_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = member_account.id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.supplier_id = supplier.id AND spu.deleted = 0 JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.spu_id = spu.id AND sku.deleted = 0 WHERE supplier.deleted = 0

SELECT CAST(mg.id AS CHAR) AS id, merchant.shop_name AS merchantName, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, mg.sale_price AS salePrice, mg.sale_status AS saleStatus, DATE_FORMAT(mg.updated_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedAt FROM supplier_info supplier JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = supplier.member_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = member_account.id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} JOIN merchant_goods mg ON mg.supplier_id = supplier.id AND mg.deleted = 0 JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = mg.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = mg.sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 WHERE supplier.deleted = 0 ORDER BY mg.updated_time DESC, mg.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supplier_info supplier JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = supplier.member_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = member_account.id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} JOIN merchant_goods mg ON mg.supplier_id = supplier.id AND mg.deleted = 0 JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = mg.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = mg.sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 WHERE supplier.deleted = 0

SELECT CAST(shipment.id AS CHAR) AS id, order_info.order_no AS orderNo, customer.company_name AS customerName, shipment.carrier_name AS carrierName, shipment.tracking_no AS trackingNo, shipment.ship_status AS shipStatus, DATE_FORMAT(shipment.ship_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS shipTime, shipment.logistics_remark AS logisticsRemark FROM shipment_info shipment JOIN order_info order_info ON order_info.id = shipment.order_id AND order_info.deleted = 0 JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = order_info.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = merchant.member_id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = order_info.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0 ORDER BY shipment.updated_time DESC, shipment.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shipment_info shipment JOIN order_info order_info ON order_info.id = shipment.order_id AND order_info.deleted = 0 JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.id = order_info.merchant_id AND merchant.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_user u ON u.member_id = merchant.member_id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} LEFT JOIN customer_info customer ON customer.id = order_info.customer_id AND customer.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_address ( member_id, address_type, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, status, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, 'RECEIVE', #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{receiverProvince}, #{receiverCity}, #{receiverDistrict}, #{receiverAddress}, 1, 'ENABLED', #{updatedBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, merchant.id AS merchantId FROM sys_user u JOIN user_identity_binding binding ON binding.user_id = u.id AND binding.deleted = 0 AND binding.identity_type = 'MERCHANT' AND binding.status = 'ENABLED' JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = binding.identity_ref_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 AND member_account.status = 'ENABLED' AND member_account.member_type = 'MERCHANT' JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = member_account.id AND merchant.deleted = 0 AND merchant.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1
